s41.title: 4.1 General Principle
s41.intro: The Blackcoin platform introduces a community participation phase, commonly referred to as the "mining phase". The main objectives of this phase are to:
listItems: Build an active community around Blackcoin services
s41.note: The mining phase is time-limited and spans a few months.

s42.title: 4.2 Nature of Participation
s42.intro: Participation is based on non-speculative actions:

disclaimer.title: ⚠️ IMPORTANT
disclaimer.text: This phase does not constitute an investment or a promise of future returns, and does not guarantee any economic benefit. No financial contribution is required.
